final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce announcement poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 Anniversary Sale, intended for Chinese e-commerce platforms (Tmall/JD/UGREEN official store), in the clean premium tonality of modern tech brand campaigns.

Style/medium: clean e-commerce poster design with the confident restraint of contemporary tech brand visual systems, designed for conversion clarity while maintaining aspirational appeal
Composition: centered hero layout with brand messaging hierarchy — headline at top, product hero zone in middle, CTA and sale details at bottom, generous margins for platform-safe zones
Subject: UGREEN NAS (Network Attached Storage) device as hero product, accompanied by anniversary celebration visual cues and "618" sale iconography
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or abstract tech-inspired environment, keeping focus on product and promotional message
Lighting/mood: crisp studio lighting with subtle depth, the quiet confidence of premium electronics photography
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as anchor, balanced with neutral whites and subtle warm accents for celebration warmth
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum finish on product, clean matte surfaces, subtle light reflections suggesting quality engineering
Text (verbatim): 绿联私有云 618周年庆
Constraints: platform-compliant aspect ratio, clear promotional hierarchy, product must remain the visual anchor, Chinese text legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: cluttered discount stickers, aggressive red-sale aesthetic, generic stock-photo tech backgrounds, 8K/masterpiece stuffer language
